concerns.detail: Repeated deletion of substantive content regarding UC Merced professor Yiwei Wang, including specific claims about graduation requirements (7篇ccf-a三年毕业), authorship policies, and recommendation letter practices. These deletions appear to suppress legitimate observations about advising practices rather than perform cleanup (typos or off-topic content).
concerns.excerpt: UC Merced, Yiwei Wang...7篇ccf-a三年毕业，6篇ccf-a三年半毕业，5篇ccf-a四年毕业...

concerns.detail: Insertion of profane insults '出生导师，出生学生' (beast/animal advisor and student) constitutes a pure personal attack using vulgar language without substantive criticism of concrete advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 瓜田，出生导师，出生学生，出生窝

concerns.detail: Insertion of '坑王' (king of pits/traps) appears to be an unsupported derogatory nickname intended as a personal insult rather than substantive criticism of advising behavior.
